description: Product descriptionComplete with performance features of a digital watch, this adidas Seoul wrist watch makes for a great everyday wear, with its various features like world time mode, quick set feature, alarm and memory chronograph to name a few.Case diameter: 46 mmCase thickness: 13 mmDial shape: Square with rounded endsBlack polyurethane strap and polycarbonate case for added durability and comfort Black digital dial displaying timer, day, date, month and alarmQuartz movement of time display using a paper-thin piece of synthetic quartz to ensure accurate time measurement 10 ATM water resistance tested using the equivalent static depth rating, with resistance  at 50 meters or 165 feet, allowing you to use it even when snorkelling, skin-diving, and swimmingSolid case back for longer watch lifeTang clasp to keep the watch firm in place as a belt buckle Chronograph system where time is counted and accumulated in various formats independent 10 Lap memory that allows the watch to record upto 10 laps. The watch divides its readings into sessions and provides average, best and local time. You may either rename these sessions or they will hold default names such as set 1, set 2, etc.Countdown Timer Backlight to view time in low light conditions
